name: Negative outlook / Watch Negative / Review for downgrade
recommended_actions: CFO-level engagement on a quarterly basis.
CEO-level appearance at annual meetings and ahead of important announcements.
Increase the cadence of communication overall — this is key to achieving a stable outlook.
Bi-weekly check-ins with the credit analyst.
Provide additional comfort and attention; be front-footed on data and postings.
Make the rating analysts feel like insiders. That comfort helps them get to a place where they can stabilize the credit.
Always be prepared with robust materials that address the analyst's most important concerns.
Resolution windows: Negative outlook needs to resolve in 18-24 months. Watch Negative / review for downgrade needs to resolve within 90 days.
